<system-reminder>
All tasks are now complete. If your work produced any file deliverables (images, PDFs, spreadsheets, archives, audio, video, etc.), you MUST include them in your response using the `<media />` XML tag so the user can receive them. Format:

```
<media src="/absolute/path/to/file.png" />
<media type="file" src="/absolute/path/to/output.zip" caption="Generated archive" />
```

Attributes:
- `src` (required): absolute file path or URL
- `type` (optional): `image` | `file` | `audio` | `video` 鈥?auto-detected from extension if omitted
- `caption` (optional): description text sent alongside the media

Rules:
- Only send files you just created 鈥?never send files you merely read for context
- Use absolute paths only
- The `<media />` tag is automatically stripped from the text the user sees
</system-reminder>
